title: Twenty-Five Personifications of Virtue
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Twenty-Five Personifications of Virtue''' were a religious belief of the [[Gopso'o]] tribe of [[Drovian]]s. They were often shouted out during battle as a type of war chant. The virtues included Truth and Beauty.

==Appearances==
*''[[Planet of Twilight]]''

[[Category:Religions]]
